input: Build a premium cinematic XR glasses landing page after the spec is approved.
expected_behavior: requires generated or real primary media
assertions: asset_evidence_lint.py passes generated filesystem media with provenance

input: A premium landing page cannot access image or video generation in this run.
assertions: SKILL.md tells executor to downgrade when assets cannot be generated or collected

input: A page has scroll-scrubbed canvas and all sections are visually nonblank, but no generated files exist.
assertions: qa.md separates asset-evidence gate from section-quality gate

input: A premium cinematic XR hero declares a generated-video asset, but the asset manifest says it was assembled locally with ffmpeg from Seedream still frames.
expected_behavior: does not count image-generation plus ffmpeg as true video generation
assertions: asset_evidence_lint.py fails ffmpeg still-frame generated-video manifests
generated-video assets require videoModel/sourceVideo/videoProvider or recognized video app provenance
